blinded.name: Blinded
blinded.effects: Cannot see. Automatic miss on attacks. Attacks against you have advantage.

charmed.name: Charmed
charmed.effects: Cannot attack the charmer. Charmer has advantage on social checks against you.

deafened.name: Deafened
deafened.effects: Cannot hear. Automatic fail on any check requiring hearing.

frightened.name: Frightened
frightened.effects: Disadvantage on attack rolls and ability checks. Cannot move closer to source.

grappled.name: Grappled
grappled.effects: Speed becomes 0. Cannot benefit from bonuses to speed. Ends if grappler is incapacitated.

invisible.name: Invisible
invisible.effects: Cannot be seen. Attacks against you have disadvantage. Your attacks have advantage.

paralyzed.name: Paralyzed
paralyzed.effects: Cannot move or speak. Automatic fail on STR and DEX saves. Attacks have advantage.

petrified.name: Petrified
petrified.effects: Turned to stone along with nonmagical objects. Cannot move or speak.

poisoned.name: Poisoned
poisoned.effects: Disadvantage on attack rolls and ability checks.

prone.name: Prone
prone.effects: Melee attack rolls against you have advantage. Ranged attacks have disadvantage.

restrained.name: Restrained
restrained.effects: Speed becomes 0. Disadvantage on attack rolls. Attacks against you have advantage.

stunned.name: Stunned
stunned.effects: Cannot move or speak. Automatic fail on STR and DEX saves. Attacks have advantage.

unconscious.name: Unconscious
unconscious.effects: Cannot move or wake unless someone uses action. Attacks have advantage.

attack.name: Attack
attack.description: Make one melee or ranged attack

castASpell.name: Cast a Spell
castASpell.description: Cast a spell with a casting time of 1 action

dash.name: Dash
dash.description: Double your speed for this turn

disengage.name: Disengage
disengage.description: Opportunity attacks against you have disadvantage

dodge.name: Dodge
dodge.description: Attack rolls have disadvantage. You make DEX saves with advantage

help.name: Help
help.description: Give another creature advantage on next ability check within 1 minute

hide.name: Hide
hide.description: Make a Stealth check. Must be out of sight of enemies

ready.name: Ready
ready.description: Choose a trigger and response for your reaction

search.name: Search
search.description: Spend 1 minute searching a 5-foot cube area

useAnObject.name: Use an Object
useAnObject.description: Interact with a second object during your turn

3.effect: Disadvantage on attack rolls and saves

A dimly-lit tavern with suspicious corners and dark secrets
A rowdy tavern known for brawls and good spirits
An upscale tavern catering to nobles and wealthy merchants
tavernSpecials: Fresh bread and aged cheese selection
Thick ale and warm meat pie
tavernRumors: A strange figure was seen heading toward the old ruins
Bandits have been spotted on the eastern road
The local lord seeks capable adventurers for a secret task
A merchant caravan went missing last week
